select(Deployment)
        .where(
            Deployment.project_id == failing.project_id,
            Deployment.status == DeploymentStatus.HEALTHY,
            Deployment.id != failing.id,
            Deployment.created_at < failing.created_at,
        )
        .order_by(Deployment.created_at.desc())
        .limit
